summary: The first routing move is `find-skills`, then `impl` as the durable work skill for a code/config/test change to an operator-facing artifact. `find-skills` found no adapter-defined trusted roots or alternate support/integration route, so the repo instruction surface points directly to `impl` for the actual work slice. No code change was performed.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: AGENTS.md explicitly routes code/config/test implementation work to `impl`; I used `find-skills` first because it is the required discovery bootstrap and it confirmed there was no better support or integration path for this repo.
